channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed

item.title: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な…
item.author: ぬまがさワタリ@『いきものニュース図解』ほか3/19同時発売 (@numagasa.bsky.social)
item.description: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な人がいることは否定しないが、感じのいいナチスと、感じのいいナチスに意地悪な人なら、後者のほうが好きといえるだろう
item.content:encoded: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な人がいることは否定しないが、感じのいいナチスと、感じのいいナチスに意地悪な人なら、後者のほうが好きといえるだろう

item.title: 赤穂きらきら坂の石段 タイルかわいい 抗がん剤が蓄積してきてるからやと思うけど めっちゃ疲れやすい ちょっと歩くだけで…
item.author: らなこ (@chu-hantora731426.bsky.social)
item.description:
赤穂きらきら坂の石段
タイルかわいい

抗がん剤が蓄積してきてるからやと思うけど
めっちゃ疲れやすい
ちょっと歩くだけですごい疲れる
やだやだ

でも出かけたいのです
今月の楽しみを何個か作った

スピリットは健在

本日もお疲れさまでした
item.content:encoded:
赤穂きらきら坂の石段
タイルかわいい

抗がん剤が蓄積してきてるからやと思うけど
めっちゃ疲れやすい
ちょっと歩くだけですごい疲れる
やだやだ

でも出かけたいのです
今月の楽しみを何個か作った

スピリットは健在

本日もお疲れさまでした

item.title: She couldn't move after being thrown from a car. Locals hear…
item.author: Niall Harbison (@niallharbison.bsky.social)
item.description:
She couldn't move after being thrown from a car. Locals heard her screaming at night from over 100 yards away in pain. The end was near for little Skye.

Just look at her now one month later ❤️
item.content:encoded:
She couldn't move after being thrown from a car. Locals heard her screaming at night from over 100 yards away in pain. The end was near for little Skye.

Just look at her now one month later ❤️

item.title: More women have nearly bled to death during miscarriage unde…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
More women have nearly bled to death during miscarriage under Texas’ abortion ban.

Experts say the trend paints a troubling picture of the harms of unnecessary delays in care. “This is striking,” one doctor said. “The trend is very clear.”

(Published July 2025)
item.content:encoded:
More women have nearly bled to death during miscarriage under Texas’ abortion ban.

Experts say the trend paints a troubling picture of the harms of unnecessary delays in care. “This is striking,” one doctor said. “The trend is very clear.”

(Published July 2025)

item.title: Cats will see you’re upset and think “you know what will mak…
item.author: For the Love of Missy (@missybbbobtail.bsky.social)
item.description: Cats will see you’re upset and think “you know what will make you feel better? ME!!!” Then they’ll catapult themselves onto your lap, aggressively headbutt you, all the while madly purring.
item.content:encoded: Cats will see you’re upset and think “you know what will make you feel better? ME!!!” Then they’ll catapult themselves onto your lap, aggressively headbutt you, all the while madly purring.

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー （自分的に）神な自作ツール配布場所 自分的に便利なソフトをシェアしますね。すべてWindowsです…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
（自分的に）神な自作ツール配布場所

自分的に便利なソフトをシェアしますね。すべてWindowsです。今後もどんどん追加していく予定です。広告とか課金とかありません。使うときは自己責任でお願いしますね。
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
（自分的に）神な自作ツール配布場所

自分的に便利なソフトをシェアしますね。すべてWindowsです。今後もどんどん追加していく予定です。広告とか課金とかありません。使うときは自己責任でお願いしますね。

item.title: Every morning, this critically endangered Red Ruffed Lemur s…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: Every morning, this critically endangered Red Ruffed Lemur spreads its arms and sunbathes for up to 40 minutes to warm up instead of burning internal energy. Only 2,500 left in the wild.
item.content:encoded: Every morning, this critically endangered Red Ruffed Lemur spreads its arms and sunbathes for up to 40 minutes to warm up instead of burning internal energy. Only 2,500 left in the wild.

item.author: Ken Paulman (@kenpaulman.bsky.social)
item.description: My father-in-law keeps his gardening hat on top of the dog kennel and I’ve been waiting patiently for two days to get this shot.

item.title: Happy Birthday America! From the last national park i've vis…
item.author: burnzz (@13urnzz.bsky.social)
item.description:
Happy Birthday America!
From the last national park i've visited, Zion. The flag as you approach the Visitor's Center.

The National Parks are the best of America, the flag belongs to all Americans, and today we remember what is worth fighting for.
#photography
item.content:encoded:
Happy Birthday America!
From the last national park i've visited, Zion. The flag as you approach the Visitor's Center.

The National Parks are the best of America, the flag belongs to all Americans, and today we remember what is worth fighting for.
#photography

item.title: Every other day, 83-year-old Marilyn Tewa of the Hopi Tribe …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Every other day, 83-year-old Marilyn Tewa of the Hopi Tribe loads buckets into her pickup and drives 5 miles to haul water. “That’s what keeps us alive,” Tewa said.

Four states stand in the way of a deal to give her community water.

with @kjzz.org
item.content:encoded:
Every other day, 83-year-old Marilyn Tewa of the Hopi Tribe loads buckets into her pickup and drives 5 miles to haul water. “That’s what keeps us alive,” Tewa said.

Four states stand in the way of a deal to give her community water.

with @kjzz.org

item.title: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth addr…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.
item.content:encoded: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.
